quests.name: The Accolade
quests.description: Sir Aldric has watched your service on the frontline. Prove your discipline and be knighted.

steps.text: Speak with Sir Aldric at the training yard.
Defeat 5 veteran training foes without falling.
Kneel before Sir Aldric to receive the accolade.

rewards.title: Knight of the Great North
rewards.message: Rise, Knight of the Great North. Your true training begins now.

_design.rule: Characters pick a CLASS TYPE (archetype) at creation and level 1-9 on the class-type tree. At level 10 a class quest per class unlocks the true class, limited by class type and the race x class matrix. One prototype quest ships first (Frontline->Knight); every other class follows this data shape.
